articles.title: Zepto’s IPO filing reveals fast growth, bigger losses, and a valuation question nobody’s answered yet
articles.description: Zepto's advertising revenue jumped 151%, outpacing the company's 104% growth in operating revenue.

articles.title: Mercor’s Brendan Foody calls out Sequoia, accusing it of ‘dual-pricing’ valuation tricks
